info.title: SuggestStorageLocation API
info.description: Searches inventory for similar items and returns their storage locations to help users decide where to store new items.

post.summary: Search inventory for similar items and suggest storage locations
post.description: Use this tool when a user asks where to store, place, or put something, or asks for storage recommendations for a new item. This tool searches the organization's inventory for similar tools and parts using semantic search and returns their current storage locations.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A rich natural language description of the item to search for. If the user provides only a name, expand it with your knowledge of what the item is, what it's used for, and what related items it might be stored near.

200.description: Successful response with similar items and their storage locations
